name: gestao-horas-client
//deps: @emotion/react + @emotion/styled are NOT imported directly: they are required peer
dependencies of @mui/material. date-fns is likewise the peer required by
@mui/x-date-pickers/AdapterDateFns. Removing them breaks the date/time pickers.
//overrides: The `esbuild` and `@octokit/rest` overrides were removed: neither package is in
the tree any more. Vite 8 transforms/minifies with Oxc instead of esbuild, and
vite-plugin-mkcert@2 no longer pulls in Octokit.
eslint-plugin-react is UNMAINTAINED (last release 2025-04) and its peer range stops
at eslint ^9.7, which blocked ESLint 10. The range is merely stale, not a real
incompatibility, so it is overridden here — and then verified by actually running
the linter. We cannot simply drop the plugin: it is the only source of
react/jsx-uses-vars (without it no-unused-vars reports 348 false positives) and of
react/prop-types (this is plain JS with PropTypes in ~55 files).
